title: coap_status.c: map_count type change reveals function signature mismatch in cbor_put_map_header
description: After changing map_count to uint16_t, the call to cbor_put_map_header(&ctx, map_count) where param is uint8_t will cause implicit conversion. Also update cbor_put_array_header for consistency. Per CCP-17 bounds check. Tag as codereview.
close_reason: Fixed by updating cbor_put_map_header and array_header to uint16_t with bounds checks in coap_status.c
